title: SlashAdditions
description: SlashAdditions a fully customizable Discordsrv extension that adds a lot of useful commands in discord that interacts with your Minecraft server!
body:
SlashAdditions

SlashAdditions a fully customizable Discordsrv extension that adds a lot of useful and customizable commands for ur discord/minecraft server

🧾 Features

Here're some of the project's best features: *Server-info command that has a configurable status embed that supports "infinite lines" and placeholderapi for more configurability* *Player-list command that displays the name of every player on the server.* *Limiting commands to a specific channel (for example ur mc->discord channel)* *Customizable stats command that supports "infinite lines" and placeholderapi* *Nearly every command can be disabled in config* *A more secure method of giving someone access to run console commands to protect against discord hijacking when using console-channel*
